zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Dymoke於1355年出生在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比 考特時，他的父親Sir John Dymoke65歲，母親Margaret de Ludlow31歲。他於1400年與Elizabeth Hebden在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1422年在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯文黑阿德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Dymoke于1355年出生在英国林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比 考特时，他的父亲Sir John Dymoke65岁，母亲Margaret de Ludlow31岁。他于1400年与Elizabeth Hebden在英国林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1422年在他的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯文黑阿德。

variants.name: Dimmock
meanings: English: habitational name from Dymock in Gloucestershire; see   Dimock  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Dymoke was born in 1355, in Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir John Dymoke, was 65 and his mother, Margaret de Ludlow, was 31. He married Elizabeth Hebden in 1400, in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1422, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Swineshead, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Dymoke est né en 1355, à Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Dymoke, avait 65 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Ludlow, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hebden en 1400, à Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1422, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Swineshead, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Dymoke 1355 in Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Dymoke 65 und seine Mutter Margaret de Ludlow 31. Er hat 1400 in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England Elizabeth Hebden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1422 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Swineshead, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Dymoke è nato il nel 1355 nel Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Dymoke, aveva 65 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Ludlow, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Hebden nel 1400, nel Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1422, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Swineshead, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Dymokeが1355年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビー コウルトで生まれた時，父Sir John Dymokeは65歳，母Margaret de Ludlowは31歳であった。1400年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビーでElizabeth Hebdenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1422年に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスウィンエシェアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Dymoke(이)가 1355년 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비 쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Dymoke(은)는 65세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Ludlow(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1400년 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비에서 Elizabeth Hebden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1422년 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스윈셰아드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Dymoke nasceu em 1355, em Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Dymoke, tinha 65 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Ludlow, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hebden em 1400, em Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1422, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Swineshead, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Dymoke родился в 1355 г. в местности скривелсби коурт, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Dymoke было 65 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Ludlow, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hebden в 1400 г. в местности скривелсби, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1422 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности сваинешид, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Dymoke nació en 1355, en Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Dymoke, tenía 65 años y su mamá, Margaret de Ludlow, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Hebden en 1400, en Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1422, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Swineshead, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
